title: Dzaleka Metadata Standard (DMS) Record
description: A metadata schema for describing heritage items from Dzaleka refugee camp. Based on Dublin Core with community-specific extensions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the record (UUID v4). Maps to dc:identifier.

title.description: Name or title of the heritage item. Maps to dc:title.

creator.description: Person(s) or organization(s) who created the item. Maps to dc:creator.

date.description: Date information associated with the item. Maps to dc:date / dcterms:created / dcterms:modified.

description.description: Narrative context or summary of the heritage item. Maps to dc:description.

type.description: Category of the heritage item. Maps to dc:type.

subject.description: Tags or keywords describing the item's content. Maps to dc:subject.

language.description: Primary language of the content using IETF BCP 47 codes (e.g., 'en', 'sw', 'fr', 'rw'). Maps to dc:language.

location.description: Geographic information associated with the item. Maps to dcterms:spatial.

rights.description: Licensing, access, and intellectual property information. Maps to dc:rights.

source.description: Information about the origin, contributor, or collection. Maps to dc:source.

format.description: MIME type of the digital object (e.g., 'image/jpeg', 'audio/mpeg'). Maps to dc:format.

relation.description: IDs of related DMS records. Maps to dc:relation.

coverage.description: Temporal extent or scope of the item's content. Maps to dc:coverage.

schema_version.description: Version of the DMS schema this record conforms to.

role.description: Role of the creator in producing this item.

affiliation.description: Organization or community the creator is affiliated with.

created.description: Date the record was created (ISO 8601, e.g., '2024-06-20').

modified.description: Date the record was last modified.

event_date.description: Date of the event or original creation of the heritage item.

area.description: Specific area or section within the location (e.g., 'Section A', 'Market Area', 'Community Center').

access_level.description: Who can access this item. 'public' = open to all, 'restricted' = requires permission, 'community-only' = Dzaleka community members.

holder.description: Name of the rights holder or copyright owner.

contributor.description: Person or organization that contributed this item to the archive.

collection.description: Named collection this item belongs to (e.g., 'Oral Histories 2024', 'Camp Maps').

original_format.description: Original format of the item before digitization (e.g., 'handwritten notebook', 'cassette tape').

start_date.description: Start date of the period covered by the item.

end_date.description: End date of the period covered by the item.

period.description: Human-readable description of the time period (e.g., 'Early settlement era', '2020-2024').
